title: Beer Is Proof
headline: Proof That Science Wins
caption:
Next time someone quotes Franklin, remind them beer isn't divine—it’s just excellent chemistry. Cheers to not taking life too seriously, unless it’s about hops.

Link in bio for your new badge of skepticism.

#BeerIsProof #SkepticApparel #ScienceOverDivine #HopsAndHumor
alt_text: Men's t-shirt with the phrase 'Beer Is Proof' on it.
